---
title: "skcausal documentation"
---

Use the guides below to learn the package in the order you need it.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Density estimators

Start here if you need the treatment density API, the difference between conditional densities and stabilized ratios, or the continuous density estimators currently documented in the package.

[**Open the density guide**](density/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Estimate causal effects for continuous treatments

See an end-to-end dose-response example using the causal estimators for continuous treatments.

---
  
[**Click here!**](/examples/dose_response_curve.qmd)
:::
